page_metadata.biotools__summary: Gene Expression platform to investigate gene expression and functionalities in the tomato genome. It includes expression data from cultivated specie/variety Heinz 1706, Ailsa Craig e Solanum pimpinellifolium.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Gene Expression platform to investigate gene expression and functionalities in the tomato genome. It includes expression data from cultivated specie/variety Heinz 1706, Ailsa Craig e Solanum pimpinellifolium.
